title: Back for Good
why_this_song: Back for Good by Take That (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Whenever I'm wrong, just tell me the song
And I'll sing it, you'll be right and understood
Got a picture of you beside me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "good" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "good" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Back for Good" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Back for Good" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Back for Good" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Back for Good" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Back for Good" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Back for Good", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Back for Good" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Back for Good" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
